channel.title: Reverb — New Bass Guitars
channel.description: Recently listed bass guitars on Reverb

item.title: Yamaha TRBX305 5-String Active Bass Guitar - Mist Green — $469.99
item.description:
$469.99 · Brand New · Downtown Sounds Workers Cooperative, Inc

The 5-String version of the TRBX300 series is built to enhance your performance with a perfectly balanced, ultra-comfortable solid mahogany body that provides optimum tonal foundation. Performance EQ active circuitry gives instant access to perfectly dialed-in, stage-ready tones, coupled with the expressive control you crave.

Sculpted Body
5-Piece Maple/Mahogany Neck
2 YGD-designed M3 Ceramic Humbucking Pickups
5-Way Performance EQ Tone Circuit

We'll match or beat the price of any of the big retailers!

For questions and more information about pricing, shipping and payment options, click the MESSAGE SELLER tab above and send a message.

All instruments are on display in our brick & mortar store and may be lightly demo’d before they are shipped. Please contact us with concerns or questions. First owner rights on brand new items still apply and all fretted instruments are inspected by our luthier prior to shipping.

International shipping is available.

We’re always looking for good used instruments at our brick & mortar store -- cash, trade, or consignment.

Downtown Sounds is a worker-owned cooperative in downtown Northampton, Massachusetts.

item.title: ACG Uber Mule Fretless Filter Electronics Short Scale — $3,600
item.description:
$3,600 · Excellent · Scott's Shop

This is a beautiful ACG Mule with Uber series filter style electronics and multicoil pickups. Black Limba body and a gorgeous figured walnut top. Purple heart fretboard with green luminlay partial lines or ghost lines and side dots. Weighs in at 8.4 lbs and comes in the padded gig bag it was received in when purchased new. Please see photos and ask any questions you may have. Feel free to look at my other listings as well.

item.title: Squier CV 70s Precision Bass (3-Tone Sunburst) — $399
item.description:
$399 · Very Good · The Guitar Rescue

Description pending. Please feel free to ask any questions!

item.title: Bass Mods K634 2023 Gloss black — $1,600
item.description:
$1,600 · Very Good · Phaze's Bass Gear Gallery

Bassmods K634 Lefty model. Bartoloni pickups, bass mods 3 band preamp, active/passive switch, 3 way mid frequency selector switch, 18v output, string thru body, hip shot tuners. Maple neck, Ash body. Gloss finish.

Comes with gig bag. (pictured)

item.title: Squier Jazz Bass (Tahitian Coral) — $379
item.description:
$379 · Very Good · The Guitar Rescue

Description pending. Please feel free to ask any questions!

item.title: Mike Lull JT4-24 Thunderbird Pickups — $6,100
item.description:
$6,100 · Excellent · Scott's Shop

Mike Lull JT4-24 is amazing condition. This bass has Thunderbird pickups in a modern position. The best 4 string bass I've ever played, but I'm just not playing 4s these days. Comes with the Lull gig bag, and strung with TI Jazz Flats. Weighs in at 8 lbs. Please see photos and ask questions if you have them. Feel free to check out my other listings as well.

item.title: Fender Jazz Bass Bridge and Pickup Covers — $90
item.description:
$90 · Very Good · 107 East

These covers are from a circa 1960s Jazz Bass. They were left behind when the guitar changed hands. They are in great shape considering their age. The rubber is missing from the bridge cover.

item.title: Yamaha BB434 Electric Bass Guitar - Teal Blue — $599.99
item.description:
$599.99 · Brand New · Downtown Sounds Workers Cooperative, Inc

Featuring a six-bolt miter neck joint, the BB400 series continues the legacy of superb sound and playability of the renowned BB series.

Solid Alder Body
6-Bolt Miter Neck Joint
5-piece Neck
YGD Custom V5 Pickups (AlnicoV)
Vintage Plus Light Bridge : Convertible Bridge and Saddle
Lightweight Open Gear Tuners

We'll match or beat the price of any of the big retailers!

For questions and more information about pricing, shipping and payment options, click the MESSAGE SELLER tab above and send a message.

All instruments are on display in our brick & mortar store and may be lightly demo’d before they are shipped. Please contact us with concerns or questions. First owner rights on brand new items still apply and all fretted instruments are inspected by our luthier prior to shipping.

International shipping is available.

We’re always looking for good used instruments at our brick & mortar store -- cash, trade, or consignment.

Downtown Sounds is a worker-owned cooperative in downtown Northampton, Massachusetts.

item.title: Squier Contemporary Active Jazz Bass V HH 2018 - Present Black — $405
item.description:
$405 · Very Good · J's Gear Bazaar

Making some room for new gear! Squier Contemporary HH Jazz Bass with a new set of D’Addario 45-100 strings and a new 9v battery

item.title: Epiphone Viola Bass - Vintage Sunburst, NYR & NYT Pickups — $449
item.description:
$449 · Brand New · Downtown Sounds Workers Cooperative, Inc

British Invasion Era Classic
The Viola electric bass recreates the British Invasion classic. Featuring a lightweight and balanced maple body and neck with NYR™ and NYT™ bass mini humbuckers.

We'll match or beat the price of any of the big retailers!

For questions and more information about pricing, shipping and payment options, click the MESSAGE SELLER tab above and send a message.

All instruments are on display in our brick & mortar store and may be lightly demo’d before they are shipped. Please contact us with concerns or questions. First owner rights on brand new items still apply and all fretted instruments are inspected by our luthier prior to shipping.

International shipping is available.

We’re always looking for good used instruments at our brick & mortar store -- cash, trade, or consignment.

Downtown Sounds is a worker-owned cooperative in downtown Northampton, Massachusetts.

item.title: Fender American Professional II Jazz Bass Black — $1,933.33
item.description:
$1,933.33 · Excellent · wurst.guitars

It's Fender's enduring bass classic: the Jazz Bass. Here in it's definitive modern version, the American Professional II. It's everything you expect from a modern Fender: very well made, super comfortable and with a great range of sounds. 

The American Professional II Jazz Bass features a slim neck with a C profile and rosewood fingerboard with rolled edges, a Hi-Mass bridge to increase sustain and a graphite Posiflex trussrod to keep the neck stabilised. The pickups are Fender V-Mod II single coils and sound great. This bass is in near mint shape and ready to make more great music. 

Condition: near mint, just the slightest of play wear. Fully original. 

Included: original case with hang tags, certificate and tools.

item.title: Roscoe SKB3006 2010s - Gloss — $3,570
item.description:
$3,570 · Very Good · Phaze's Bass Gear Gallery

Preside finish. Comes with a Roscoe Semi hard case.

3-piece Maple/PH/Maple neck w/ Brazillian RW board & Roscoe oval inlays

Graphite reinforced neck.

Bartolini Electronics - 3 band eq

Mahogany Body with Striped Cocobolo top 35 inch scale; 24 frets.

Black and gold accented bridge with black tuners and gold knobs and strap locks.

item.title: Dean EAB Acoustic-Electric Bass 2010s - Satin Natural — $245
item.description:
$245 · Good · Lillshack Records

Fine functioning 24 fret acoustic electric

Active electronics and tuner on board.
Nice low deep E’s and F’s .

item.title: Epiphone Viola Bass 1998 Vintage Sunburst (Made in Korea - Unsung Factory) w/ Original Hardshell Case — $495
item.description:
$495 · Very Good · MT's Clutter Cavern

Up for sale is a fantastic 1998 Epiphone Viola Bass in a gorgeous Vintage Sunburst finish. If you are looking for an early, Korean-era build, this one was manufactured at the Unsung factory in June of 1998. These early Korean models are highly regarded for their rock-solid construction, finish work, and overall reliability compared to later modern productions.

This bass delivers that iconic, woody, thumping '60s tone perfect for rock, blues, and indie tracks. The short-scale neck is fast and comfortable.

Body/Neck: Excellent cosmetic shape with beautiful wood grain flame showing through the sunburst finish.

Hardware: The chrome hardware and control plates show some natural player tarnish and oxidation commensurate with a 28-year-old vintage instrument. All components function exactly as they should.

Will be packed with professional care. The bass will be secured inside its hardshell case with extra headstock padding, and shipped inside a heavy-duty, certified Reverb instrument box via UPS Ground. Fully insured with tracking.

Please feel free to reach out with any questions or if you need additional photos! Sold as-is.

item.title: G&L Tribute Series M-2000 Bass with Maple Fretboard 2000s - 3-Tone Sunburst — $789
item.description:
$789 · Very Good · Zeno's Gear Garage

Very good condition 2005 made in Korea Tribute series G&L L-2000 for sale! Feels and sounds awesome. Aside from a couple light scuffs, in very nice cosmetic condition. Recently put on fresh strings. A very flexible bass for studio or live use. Includes hard case! Local pickup in Sherman Oaks / LA preferred.

item.title: Fender JB-62 Jazz Bass '62 Reissue CIJ 1997 Black Japan w/ Gig Bag — $1,095
item.description:
$1,095 · Very Good · A Flash Flood of Gear

This is a great '62 reissue Fender Jazz Bass from the Crafted in Japan era! The neck profile comes in on the slimmer side, making this one super comfortable. The pickups sound great delivering the classic 60s Jazz Bass sound.

This bass is in great shape, especially considering its age. There is some normal light play wear such as a few small blemishes and other wear throughout. The hardware shows light patina consistent with age. The frets are in great shape, exhibiting only light play wear. The electronics function as they should.

The G string bridge saddle has been replaced, this bass is otherwise original.

Pickup Readings:
N - 6.86
B - 7.02

This guitar comes freshly set up with D'addario EXL170 (45-100) Bass Roundwound strings.

Includes the pictured Gig Bag.

Make: Fender
Model: JB-62 Jazz Bass Reissue CIJ
Year: 1997-2000
Fretboard Material: Rosewood
Fretboard Radius: 7.25"
Scale length: 34"
Weight: 9.13 pounds
Nut Width: 1.53"
Neck Width at 12th fret: 2.2"
Neck Thickness at 1st fret: 0.83"
Neck Thickness at 12th fret: 0.95"
Case/bag: Includes the pictured Gig Bag
Made in Japan

We have shipped hundreds of instruments and other music related items and can assure you that your new gear will be packed professionally with the utmost care, using high quality materials.

Please see pictures for exact condition and details.

If you have any questions please let us know. Thanks for looking!

item.title: Fender Player Plus Jazz Bass V — $835.91
item.description:
$835.91 · Excellent · Álvaro Menacho González

Fender Player Plus Active Jazz Bass V MN – Cosmic Jade. Year 2023

  • Body: Alder
  • Body Finish: Gloss Polyester
  • Body Shape: Jazz Bass
  • Neck Material: Maple
  • Neck Finish: Satin Urethane
  • Neck Profile: Modern “C”
  • Scale Length: 34” (86.36 cm)
  • Fingerboard: Maple
  • Fingerboard Radius: 12” (305 mm)
  • Number of Frets: 20
  • Fret Size: Medium Jumbo
  • Nut: Synthetic Bone
  • Nut Width: 1.875” (47.6 mm)
  • Position Inlays: Black Pearloid Dots
  • Bridge Pickup: Player Plus Noiseless Jazz Bass
  • Neck Pickup: Player Plus Noiseless Jazz Bass
  • Controls: Master Volume, Pan Pot (Pickup Blend), Treble Boost/Cut, Mid Boost/Cut, Bass Boost/Cut, Mini Toggle Switch for Active/Passive Mode
  • Pickup Configuration: SS
  • Bridge: Fender HiMass 4-Saddle Bridge with Chrome-Plated Zinc Saddles
  • Hardware Finish: Nickel/Chrome
  • Tuning Machines: Standard Open-Gear
  • Control Knobs: Vintage-Style Black Plastic Jazz Bass Knobs


Location: Spain


The bass was buyed in 2024, still in excellent condition, has been professionally set up by a luthier, ready to play. It includes the original Sadowsky gig bag. I’m open to reasonable offers and trade proposals.

item.title: Squier Vintage Modified Jaguar Bass 2011-2014 - sunburst — $375
item.description:
$375 · Excellent · Brian's Gear Outlet

Squier Vintage Modified Jaguar Bass (2011-2014) – 3-Color Sunburst

Excellent condition

Free Shipping within 48 states

Offers considered


Produced between 2011 and 2014, this era of the Vintage Modified series is famous for punching way above its price point, offering incredible Fender-like build quality and exceptional tonal flexibility. Thanks to its PJ pickup configuration, you get the deep, thumping low end of a Precision Bass combined with the growling, articulate bite of a Jazz Bass. The slim, fast maple neck makes it incredibly comfortable to play, whether you are a beginner or a gigging pro.

Key Specs:

  • Finish: 3-Color Sunburst
  • Neck Material: Slim "C" Shape Maple
  • Fingerboard: Rosewood with dot inlays
  • Pickups: 1 Split Single-Coil (Precision) & 1 Single-Coil (Jazz)
  • Scale Length: 34" Standard Scale

item.title: Ibanez AEB5E-BK Acoustic-Electric Bass — $174.95
item.description:
$174.95 · Very Good · Gambold Vintage

Terrific condition Ibanez acoustic-electric bass. This instrument was owned and rarely used by a barbershop quartet. Striking gloss-black finish has no nicks or dents and fretboard shows minimal use.

This bass features a full acoustic tone, and Ibanez’s AEQ‑2T preamp with onboard tuner provide a rich amplified sound. This is a well‑maintained axe that is ready for home or studio recording, and live performance in any venue. Includes a Gator gig bag. Requires a 9-volt battery for the tuner/pre-amp.

item.title: Fender Player II Modified Active Precision Bass with Rosewood Fretboard 2025 - Present - Olympic Pearl — $635
item.description:
$635 · Fair · Lillshack Records

A fine player Ii with active and passive Controls . Dinged by a forklift on shipment. I got a deal and lived with it as it still looked, played and sounded great.
Includes fender gig bag and such .

item.title: Fender American Professional II Jazz Bass Fretless 2020 - Present - Olympic White — $1,150
item.description:
$1,150 · Excellent · Timothy's Gear Outlet

Beautiful instrument, 1 owner, rarely used, need space for the new adventure. Near mint.

item.title: Fender Precision Bass 57 Reissue 1984 - Rare Blonde — $3,800
item.description:
$3,800 · Very Good · Brian’s Guitars and Basses

Rare and beautiful 84 Fullerton Reissue P bass. Only selling this because I own a real 58 P, otherwise it would stay with me. Looks amazing with authentic wear from countless gigs. Plays and sounds like a good P should. Everything functions as it should. All original with OHSC, covers, and hangtags. The handle on the case was replaced. Not the prettiest job but the handle is rock solid. The checking on this bass is insane. Weight is 8.8 lbs on my scale. Plays perfect with rounds or flats. I’m open to very close offers but I assure you she’s worth every penny. Will ship strung with DR rounds. Local pickup is preferred but I will ship to anywhere in the US for an additional $80. Thanks for looking and feel free to ask questions.

Fine print: no returns or refunds partial or otherwise. This policy is to avoid scammers. I describe all guitars to the best of my ability and my feedback speaks for itself. No international sales.

item.title: Sadowsky MetroLine 2021 Special Edition 4 String 24-Fret Modern Bass, Natural Transparent Satin — $5,805
item.description:
$5,805 · Brand New · Wire Meets Wood Guitars

SKU: SML024SJ4 90BXXXXFRThe

Sadowsky MetroLine 24-Fret Modern Bass 2021 Special Edition is a limited-run German-built instrument that showcases premium tonewoods and refined Sadowsky craftsmanship. Limited to just 67 pieces worldwide, this 4-string features an undersized J-style body crafted from lightweight okoume and crowned with a stunning AAAA figured Claro Walnut top, finished in a Natural Transparent Satin that lets the wood's character shine through.

The roasted maple bolt-on neck paired with an ebony fingerboard delivers a fast, modern playing experience across all 24 frets, making this bass equally suited for melodic soloing and deep-pocket grooves. At its core, a pair of passive Sadowsky Soapbar pickups feed into an active preamp with bass and treble boosts alongside Sadowsky's renowned Vintage Tone Control (VTC), giving players the ability to seamlessly blend modern clarity with warm, classic bass tones at the pull of a knob.

Whether you're laying down studio tracks or commanding the stage, the MetroLine 24-Fret Modern delivers the tonal versatility and exceptional playability that has made Sadowsky a go-to name among professional bassists worldwide. This special edition's combination of exotic tonewoods, thoughtful electronics, and collectible rarity makes it a standout addition to any player's arsenal.

Headstock

  • Nut Material: Sadowsky Just-a-Nut III
  • Tuning Machines: Sadowsky light open gear machine heads

Neck

  • Neck Material: Roasted American maple, C-shape, bolt-on
  • Fingerboard Material: Ebony
  • Inlay Style: White dot inlays
  • Number of Frets: 24 nickel silver frets
  • Fret Size: 0.094" wide x 0.051" high / 2.4 mm x 1.3 mm
  • Nut Width: 1.5" / 38.5 mm
  • Scale Length: 34" / 864 mm long scale
  • String Count: 4-string
  • String Gauges: Sadowsky Blue Label stainless steel, .045–.105

Body

  • Body Shape: Sleek undersized body with two octave note range and deeper cutaways
  • Body Wood: Okoume
  • Top Material: Figured Claro walnut
  • Back Cover: Sadowsky Easy-Access compartment cover
  • Protector: Sadowsky Fretboard Protector

Bridge & Saddle

  • Bridge: Sadowsky bridge with quick string release, 20 mm spacing
  • Bridge Total String Spacing: 2.36" / 60 mm

Electronics

  • Bridge Pickup: Sadowsky passive hum-cancelling J-style pickup
  • Neck Pickup: Sadowsky passive hum-cancelling J-style pickup
  • Preamp / Electronics: Active Sadowsky 2-way electronics with bass and treble boost, plus Vintage Tone Control
  • Controls: Volume / Balance / Vintage Tone Control / Treble and Bass stacked

Hardware & Finish

  • Finish: Natural Transparent Satin
  • Hardware Color: Black
  • Strap System: Sadowsky S-Security Locks

Miscellaneous

  • Case: Sadowsky PortaBag
  • Country of Origin: Germany
  • Tools: Hex key tools
  • Weight: 9 lbs. / 4.1 kg or less

item.title: Mint Fender Player Plus Precision Bass with Pau Ferro Fretboard - 2021 - Pearl White — $729
item.description:
$729 · Excellent · Blues Man

Perfect in every way
Mint condition

item.title: Mayones Custom Shop Patriot 5 Classic VF 'Hulk' 5-String 2014 Electric Bass — $3,896.93
item.description:
$3,896.93 · Very Good · Sell Us Your Guitar

This guitar is a commission sale  - if you have a high end guitar you are interested in selling, please contact us via our easy to find website - search: Sell Us Your Guitar.


Here for sale we have an incredibly unique high-end 5 string electric bass guitar from Polish manufacturer Mayones. Founded in Gdansk in 1982, Mayones specialise in handcrafting custom made instruments, whilst also offering a line of high end production models. This particular example was custom ordered as a Patriot 5 Classic VF, and features a custom colour combination which the customer named 'Hulk', as indicated by the custom truss rod cover engraving. The top and headstock are finished with 'Trans Dirty Purple Matt', whilst the rear and sides of the body are finished in Trans Emerald Green. 


Manufactured in 2014, this bass features a neck-thru construction comprising an Alder body with 3A Flame Maple top, 5-ply Wenge/Padouk neck and 24 fret Rosewood fingerboard. Black hardware is fitted including an ABM 3710 5x single-saddle bridge and Schaller M4 sealed tuning machines, as well as an Ebony nut. A pair of Bartolini xxP46C Soapbar pickups are installed, and are wired to an Aguilar OBP-3 on-board preamp, with controls for master volume, pickup balance, middle, bass, treble and passive tone, with a mini toggles for coil splitting and active/passive modes.


The 5-ply Wenge/Padouk neck plays superbly, with a fairly slim profile which might be described as a 'D' shape. The shallow shoulders work to moderate the nut width, which is fairly substantial as a 5-string. The open-pore texture of the Wenge to the rear of the neck is pleasant under the thumb, creating a tactile sensation when traversing the neck which adds unique character to the playing experience. The neck-thru construction and generous cutaways ensures that access to the top frets is a breeze, opening up the full range of the instrument The multi-scale configuration of this bass ensures an even string tension in standard or altered tunings. Ranging from 33"-35", the scale length retains a fairly traditional feel due to its proximity to the standard 34", whilst also reducing how extreme the 'fan' of the frets is. 


The pair of Bartolini Soapbar pickups installed in this bass work in conjunction with the on-board Aguilar OBP-3 preamp to deliver an incredibly versatile range of sounds. There is great fundamental bass tone with the controls at their midpoints, producing a warm and powerful low end, clear mids and sparkling top end that captures the attack of your playing. The ability to switch between active and passive modes at the flick of a switch is invaluable, whilst the rest of the extensive controls provide ample tone-sculpting opportunities, allowing you to craft the perfect sound for almost any musical setting, as well as tweaking whilst playing. This is an incredibly well-made bass, with the playability and sounds to back up its striking aesthetics. Perfect for the contemporary working musician who demands quality and versatility.


Brand- Mayones

Model- Custom Shop: Patriot 5 Classic VF

Finish- 'Hulk' 

Year- 2014

Made In- Poland

Body- Alder

Top- 3A Flame Maple

Neck- Wenge/ Padouk 5-Ply

Fingerboard- Rosewood

Fingerboard Radius- 20"

Frets- 24 Ferdinand Wagner Nickel Silver (2.62x1.20)

Scale Length- 33" - 35" Multi-Scale

Nut Width- 1.8635"

Pickups- 2x Bartolini Soapbars: xxP46C-B (Neck), xxP46C-T (Bridge)

Controls- Aguilar OBP-3 On-Board Preamp: Master Volume, Pickup Balance, Middle, Treble/Bass (Stacked), Passive Tone, Coil Split Mini Toggle, Active/Passive Mode Mini Toggle


Luthier Report


Our ID: 120032587370

Weight: 9.45lbs  

Serial: PAN1404045


Aesthetic Condition:

Headstock: Overall excellent condition. The top rear edge demonstrates light scuffing and indentation which is difficult to discern against the open grain wenge.


Neck: Overall very good condition. Light indentation to the centre rear of the neck can be felt in the playing position behind the 7th fret. This does not affect the overall playability of the instrument. The fingerboard has a moderate indentation at the 19th fret beneath the D string which cannot be felt under the string when playing. Further light scratching is present in the lower register, treble side. 


Body: Overall very good condition. The rear of the body demonstrates indentation and small chips to the finish consistent with buckle rash. Further indentation is apparent to the treble side edge, with six string indentations apparent to the rear of the treble side horn and similar markings surrounding the jack socket.  The bass side horn demonstrates several moderate indentations piercing the finish slightly to the rear. The front face demonstrates a moderate indentation to the bass side of the lower bout beside the bridge, which does not pierce the finish.


Condition of Frets:

The frets demonstrate very light signs of use, not affecting playability. There is considerable material remaining for any future fret work the new owner may wish to perform.


Current Set Up:

Truss Rod: Fully functional. Truss rod tool (4mm hex) included.

Hardware: Fully functional with light signs of wear. The stacked concentric pot has had the top knob replaced with a silver one. The forward battery cover has a small part of the catch broken off, but remains fully functional. 

Structural: No concerns or issues to note.

Height of the string from the 12th Fret-2mm - Bass 2.5mm

Please be aware that the action on a guitar may move slightly in transit and this measurement is the current height.


Strings on Guitar - 45-100


Electrics: 

Fully functional. 2x 9v batteries not included. 


Case & Accessories:

Hiscox hard case

The case demonstrates light signs of use, remaining fully functional. COA, owners manual, strap locks, truss and bridge adjustment tools included in the case.


This guitar is a commission sale  - if you have a high end guitar you are interested in selling, please contact us via our easy to find website - search: Sell Us Your Guitar.


Please be aware that for international buyers import fees are not included in our postage and packaging cost, this only covers the cost of the guitar being sent to you. Import fees will be charged by Customs upon the guitar's arrival in the recipient country. Due to Brexit, this also applies to EU buyers. We advise checking the total import cost with Customs as this is not information we are able to accurately provide.

item.description:
$417.95 · Excellent · Patrizio's Gear Garage

Mini bass with buil-in speaker.

Piezo pickup. Near mint!

Output jack for amp use.

Fretless, with flatwound strings.

Internal amp checked, works with 2x9Vdc batteries.

Original soft case.

Used, good condition.

No damage, but a few cosmetic blemishes. A few scuffs in the pick guard, a small chip on the bottom of the body.

Includes Gator hard case.

item.title: 2025 Fender American Professional II Jazz Bass - 9.09 LBS — $1,499
item.description:
$1,499 · Mint · The Guitar Rescue

Condition Notes:  Used - Like New

Brand:  Fender

Model:  American Professional II Jazz Bass

Year:  2025

Serial:  US24053894

Color:  3-Tone Sunburst

Weight:  9.09 lbs

Strings:  D'Addario 

NECK

  • Neck Type:  Bolt-On
  • Frets:  20
  • Scale Length:  34"
  • Fret Life:  100%
  • Neck Material:  Maple
  • Fretboard Material:  Maple
  • Neck Finish:  "Super-Natural" Satin Urethane
  • Nut Width:  1.5"
  • 1st Fret:  .78"
  • 12th Fret:  .89"

    • Bridge:  6.98k

INCLUDES:  Certificate of Authenticity, Fender Deluxe Molded Case

Disclaimer: You are not buying a setup, you are buying an instrument. This means that the setups we perform on instruments for sale are intended to inspect and ensure proper function of various aspects of the instruments. Customer-based setups are personal and no two players will require the same setups measurements.

item.title: Bass Collection ‘Lizzy’ Power Bass Jet Black Electric Bass — $557.70
item.description:
$557.70 · Very Good · Sell Us Your Guitar

Bass Collection ‘Lizzy’ Power Bass Jet Black Electric Bass

Here for sale we have a Bass Collection 'Lizzy' power bass in Jet Black finish. Built in Korea in 2014, this bass is based on Phil Lynott's iconic mirror scratch plate design, this guitar features a bolt-on construction comprising a Basswood body, Maple neck and 20 fret Rosewood fingerboard. This instrument is fitted with a vintage Chrome bridge cover and chrome hardware.

The pickups installed are a pair of Passive EMG style, which are wired to a master volume and tone controls


The maple neck plays very well with its vintage 'C' neck profile feeling responsive and fast while keeping its classic feel.  The satin finish to the rear makes for uninterrupted and fluid playing. The Rosewood fingerboard provides a durable and smooth playing surface and with its 17" fingerboard radius making for an accurate and effortless playing experience especially for thumping single note basslines.


The Passive EMG style pickups sound very well balanced, providing a classic vintage tone that packs a punch. A rich low end is complemented well by a smooth midrange along with clear but natural highs. The pickups deliver the classic thumping vintage tones that are iconic to Thin Lizzy songs, especially when played with a pick.


Brand - Bass Collection

Model -  ‘Lizzy’ Power Bass

Finish - Jet Black

Year - 2014

Made In - Korea

Body - Basswood

Neck - Maple

Neck Profile - 'C'

Fingerboard - Rosewood

Fingerboard Radius - 17

Frets - 20

Scale Length- 34

Nut Width - 1.625

Pickups - Passive EMG Style

Controls - Master volume, Master tone


Luthier Report


Our ID: 1030923041612

Weight: 9lbs

Serial: N/A


Aesthetic Condition

Headstock:  Overall very good condition, very light scratching is apparent to all aspects of the head stock. These markings are only visible under direct lighting at certain angles. A small discolouration is present to the tip of the headstock.

Neck:  Overall very good condition, light indentation is apparent to the rear across the entire register, most notably at the 5th fret. The fingerboard displays slight indentations from where the strings have pressed against the fingerboard, these are most apparent at the 2nd, 3rd, 4th and 5th frets, these can not be felt in the playing position. On the second fret a crack is present, this can not be felt in the playing position and should not worsen over time.

Body: Overall very good condition, all aspects of the body demonstrate consistent light to moderate scratching visible only under direct lighting at certain angles. On the rear of the body at the treble side edge an indentation is present, this very slightly breaks the finish. Small indentations are present at the lower bout rear face, these do not break the finish.


Condition of Frets:

The frets demonstrate light signs of use, not affecting playability. This guitar demonstrates mild fret noise which is not apparent when amplified. This noise does not affect sustain of notes, nor does it affect bending the notes. The new owner may choose to raise the action to alleviate this.


Current Set Up:

Truss Rod: Fully functional. Truss rod tool (4mm hex) not included.

Hardware: Fully functional with light signs of wear. The pick guard displays moderate scratching which is consistent with regular use.

Structural: No concerns or issues to note.


Height of the string from the 12th Fret-2.5mm - Bass 3mm


Please be aware that the action on a guitar may move slightly in transit and this measurement is the current height.


Strings on Guitar - 45-100


Electrics: Fully Functional


Case & Accessories

Rockbag Gigbag

The case displays light signs of past use.


Please be aware that for international buyers import fees are not included in our postage and packaging cost, this only covers the cost of the guitar being sent to you. Import fees will be charged by Customs upon the guitar's arrival in the recipient country. Due to Brexit, this also applies to EU buyers. We advise checking the total import cost with Customs as this is not information we are able to accurately provide.

item.title: Ibanez SRF705 Fretless - Brown Burst Flat — $876.98
item.description:
$876.98 · Very Good · Every Gear Nerd's Friend!

A super versatile and quirky fretless. This bass has an endless amount of potential and exploration inside it. You can get everything from the slap in the face Jaco sound to the authentic double bass with this bad boy.

This bass is definitely for you in you're into soloing and transcribing as the range is insane. I'm only selling because I don't have the time to sink into practice time anymore, so I want to go to someone who will give it the proper love and attention it deserves.

Bass is in perfect working order and great condition (other than the few dents seen in the pictures). Comes with nicely worn in flatwound strings that sound lovely and warm.


Specifications

  • Product Code: SRF705-BBF

Body and Bridge

  • Material: Mahogany
  • Construction: Neck-Through
  • Finish: Brown Burst Flat
  • Bridge: Custom

Neck and Fingerboard

  • Neck Material: 5-Piece Maple/Walnut
  • Neck Profile: SRF5
  • Scale Length: 34”
  • Fingerboard Material: Bound Panga Panga
  • Fingerboard Radius: 12”
  • Frets: 30 Fretless
  • Inlays: Side Dots and Fret Markers
  • Nut: PPS, Black
  • Nut Width: 45mm

Hardware and Electronics

  • Bridge Pickup: Bartolini MK-1
  • Neck Pickup: Bartolini MK-1
  • Electronics: AeroSilk Piezo System
  • Controls: Volume, Tone, 2-Band EQ
  • Tuners: Die Cast
  • Hardware: Cosmo Black
  • Strings: Flatwound (.045, .065, .080, .100, .132 Gauges)

item.title: Elrick Gold Evolution 2006 - Buckeye Burl Top — $3,760.39
item.description:
$3,760.39 · Excellent · Álvaro Menacho González

Elrick Gold Evolution 5-string bass made in USA by luthier Rob Elrick in 2006.


Specifications:

  • Buckeye Burl top
  • American Ash body
  • Birdseye Maple fingerboard
  • Wenge neck
  • 35” scale
  • Bartolini USA Jazz pickups
  • Aguilar OBP-3 preamp (18V)
  • Hipshot tuners
  • Weight: 3.7 kg

Includes Gator cases hardcase and gruvgear strap.

Bass is located in Spain, in excellent condition and has been professionally set up by a luthier, with a low action, ready to play.


OPEN TO TRADE OFFERS

item.title: Epiphone Jack Casady Signature Bass With Hard Case - Metallic Gold — $723.62
item.description:
$723.62 · Very Good · Every Gear Nerd's Friend!

This bass is an absolute joy to play and the tones are honestly incredible. Think p-bass but with it's own distinct warmth and character. If you're looking to change it up, or just looking for something distinct in your arsenal then this is a great place to look.


Bass is in great condition with no dents or scratches. All tested and working as it should. I've thrown in the hard case as well which is handy as the semi-hollow body doesn't fit in standard gig-bags. Only been gigged a handful of times. Needs someone to get it the proper love and attention it deserves.


Body

  • Body Top: Layered Maple
  • Body Back: Layered Maple
  • Body Finish: Gloss

Neck & Fingerboard

  • Neck Type: Mahogany
  • Scale Length: 863.6mm
  • Fingerboard Radius: 305.054mmR
  • Fingerboard Material: Indian Laurel
  • Number Of Frets: 20
  • Inlay: Trapezoid
  • Nut Width: 41.5036mm

Hardware & Electronics

  • Pickup: JCB-1 Low-Impedance Humbucker™
  • Controls: Volume & Tone
  • Pickup Switching: 3-Way Rotary Impedance Selector Switch
  • Tuning Machines: Die Cast - Clover Buttons
  • TrussRod: Dual Action
  • Bridge: 3 Point Adjustable
  • Hardware Finish: Nickel

item.title: Rogue SX100B-BK Series II 4-String Bass 2010s - Black — $90
item.description:
$90 · Very Good · B's Guitars

Rogue SX100B electric bass. In great shape. No major damage, some scuffs and scratches. Neck is straight and it plays well. Electronics work as they should. Great beginner or budget bass. Local pickup in Ocoee, FL also available.

item.title: MIJ Ibanez 5902 Bison Bass Guitar Project — $280
item.description:
$280 · Non Functioning · J.L.R. Guitars

1960’s Ibanez Bass Guitar I got in a trade. The neck was warped and splitting in the center, so I prepared to rebuild the core of the neck and install a new truss rod.


I have drilled files to align the fretboard in place, squared off one edge, and split the neck into parts to use as a template. Please look at the photos for reference.


Only non original Piece to my knowledge is the bridge - which is was a replaced with a simple Fender 5-screw. the bridge was missing when I got it.


Body is fully functional from everything I have tried. Pickups work! Original bridge cover also included. Neck plate and original neck screws also included. Tuners, string tree, etc also included.

Some minor hard ware (screws, etc) may be missing worst case.


I was hoping to do something great with this bass - but I just had surgery and we’re moving soon after I recover. I’ve taken the time to do it right but have way too much going on right now.


Every Ibanez 5902 I have seen has been at or over $1k. Asking less than a third of that - even if it’s only for the body.


It’s not an easy project - but a rewarding one if completed.


At asking price I will include new fret wire and the bitterroot truss rod I bought for it.


Located in Richmond, VA or shipped. Sold as described - please ask any pertinent questions before purchasing.


Thank you for the consideration.

item.title: Fender Telecaster Bass Blonde 1977 Vintage Electric Bass Guitar — $3,583.23
item.description:
$3,583.23 · Very Good · Sell Us Your Guitar

This guitar is a commission sale. If you have a high-end or vintage guitar you are interested in selling please contact us.


Due to the value & fragility of this instrument, it is offered as COLLECTION ONLY from our Ashton-under-Lyne store. Specialist courier delivery is available from £55 - please inquire. 


Here for sale we have a Fender Telecaster Bass in Blonde finish. Made in the USA in 1977, this bass comes from the second run of Telecaster Basses which were available from '71 up to their discontinuation in 1979. The original version was introduced in 1968, and was largely a reissue of the original Precision Bass, featuring Telecaster inspired features such as the small headstock, solitary single-coil pickup and separate control plate. In 1971 the design was updated to include some of the well-known CBS era appointments including the bullet truss rod nut and 3-bolt micro-tilt neck plate. Additionally the pickguard was re-designed to incorporate the controls and Fender's new Seth Lover-designed Wide Range pickup. The model was discontinued in '79, but has enjoyed several subsequent reissues as part of the Squier Vintage Modified series & Fender's Vintera II lineup. 


Naturally, a bolt-on construction is employed, and comprises an Ash body, Maple neck and 20 fret Maple fingerboard. Chrome hardware is fitted including a top-loading 4-saddle bridge with cover and Fender open-geared tuning machines. A Fender Wide Range Bass humbucking pickup is installed on the 3-ply black/white/black pickguard, and is wired to master volume & tone controls. 


The Maple neck plays very comfortably, with what might be described as a ‘U’ profile. This fillsthe hand reassuringly whilst still allowing for comfortable reach in all registers and promoting ergonomic thumb positioning. The double cutaway body design offers extended access into the upper register which works well with the gloss finish to the rear of the neck, allowing for smooth navigation of the 34” scale. The frets are on the larger size, feeling similar to modern medium jumbos. These feel great under the fingers, and provide the versatility required for a wide range of playing styles and techniques. 


The Wide Range Bass humbucker installed in this guitar had only been introduced in 1971, so the Telecaster bass was one of the first instruments to feature the pickup as factory standard. The Wide Range Bass humbucker makes use of 4 magnetised pole pieces rather than the bar magnet and screw arrangement of the Gibson PAF. Due to the difficulty of machining AlNiCo (Aluminium/Nickel/Cobalt) into threaded rod magnets, Fender chose to use CuNiFe magnets (Copper/Nickel/Iron) instead. As they produce less output than AlNiCo magnets, more windings were needed to produce enough output- resulting in a much larger enclosure than a typical humbucker.  The tone is full-bodied and warm, filling out the bottom of the mix very nicely whilst still capturing all the snap and attack of your playing. A seriously cool instrument in astonishing condition. 


Brand- Fender

Model- Telecaster Bass

Finish- Blonde

Year- 1977

Made In- USA

Body- Ash

Neck- Maple

Fingerboard- Maple

Fingerboard Radius- 7.25"

Frets- 20

Scale Length- 34"

Nut Width- 1.627"

Pickups- Fender Wide Range Bass Humbucker

Controls- Master Volume, Master Tone


Luthier Report


Our ID: 1091125152194

Weight: 11.2lbs  

Serial: S701439


Aesthetic Condition:

Headstock: Overall very good condition. The top edge demonstrates some scuffing and light indentation that does not pierce the finish. This continues around the treble side, very slightly wearing through the finish on the front edge. Light scratching to all aspects of the headstock is visible under direct light, as is common with high gloss finishes. 


Neck: Overall very good condition. The fingerboard demonstrates some chipping of the finish surrounding certain frets, most notably frets 5 & 7. There is a moderate indentation piercing the finish between the D & G string at the last fret.The fingerboard edges show light to mild playwear, discolouring the finish slightly between frets 9-11 on the bass side and throughout the register on the treble side. 


Body: Overall very good condition. The front face demonstrates some small chips to the finish around the bridge cover, revealing the wood beneath. The bottom edge demonstrates consistent light indentation that occasionally chips the finish. Some discoloration is also apparent. The rear face demonstrates light scratching and indentation visible only under direct lighting at certain angles. Two chips to the clear coat are apparent beneath the neck plate.


Condition of Frets:

The frets demonstrate moderate signs of use with flattening of the crown throughout the register. This does not affect playability. There is a moderate amount of material remaining for future fret work.


Current Set Up:

Truss Rod: Fully functional. Truss rod tool (1/8" hex) not included.

Hardware: Fully functional with moderate signs of use.

Structural: No concerns or issues to note.

Height of the string from the 12th Fret-mm - Bass mm

Please be aware that the action on a guitar may move slightly in transit and this measurement is the current height.


Strings on Guitar - 45-100


Electrics: 

Fully functional.


Case & Accessories:

CNB soft case

The case demonstrates light signs of use. No truss rod tool included. 


This guitar is a commission sale. If you have a high-end or vintage guitar you are interested in selling please contact us.


Due to the value & fragility of this instrument, it is offered as COLLECTION ONLY from our Ashton-under-Lyne store. Specialist courier delivery is available from £55 - please inquire. 


Please be aware that for international buyers import fees are not included in our postage and packaging cost, this only covers the cost of the guitar being sent to you. Import fees will be charged by Customs upon the guitar's arrival in the recipient country. Due to Brexit, this also applies to EU buyers. We advise checking the total import cost with Customs as this is not information we are able to accurately provide.

item.title: Schecter FreeZesicle 4 Electric Bass, Metallic White — $1,399
item.description:
$1,399 · Brand New · zZounds

The Schecter FreeZesicle-4 solid body electric 4-string bass is the ultimate bass players bass. From premium and professional specifications to extraordinary looks and style, the FreeZesicle-4 will fill all of your bass playing needs. Designed with the professional player in mind, the FreeZesicle-4 is built with a swamp ash body for warm and rich tones.

Loaded with active EMG J and P pickups as well as an active EMG 3-band EQ with 18 volts of power, the FreeZesicle-4 provides thump and thunder while leaving every tonal option available at your fingertips. Additional features include a Graphtech nut, Schecter Custom fully adjustable top-load or string-thru bass bridge, and Grover tuners with Vintage keys.

Specs: 

  • Model Name: FreeZesicle-4
  • Guitar Color Shown: Freeze Purple
  • Tuners: Grover Bass with Vintage Keys
  • Fretboard Material: Ebony
  • Neck Material: Canadian Rock Maple with Carbon Fiber Reinforcement Rods
  • Inlays: Gold Pearloid Crown at 12th Fret & Heart at 19th Fret
  • Side Dot Markers: White Dots
  • Scale: 34"
  • Neck Shape: "C"
  • Thickness: @ 1st Fret- 21mm)/ @ 12th Fret- 23mm
  • Frets: 24 Narrow Jumbo
  • Fretboard Radius: 12"
  • Nut: Graph Tech XL Black Tusq
  • Nut Width: 38mm
  • Guitar Colors: Freeze Purple
  • Hardware Color: Gold
  • Top Contour: Flat Top with Bevel
  • Dexterity: Right Handed
  • Construction: Bolt-on
  • Body Material: Swamp Ash
  • Bridge: Gold Schecter Custom fully-adjustable Top-load or String-thru
  • Controls: Master Volume/ Master Tone/ EMG 3-Band B64 EQ
  • Bridge Pickup: White EMG 35J
  • Neck Pickup White EMG 35P
  • Battery Compartment: 18-volt w/Screw Plate
  • Knobs: Metal Dome w/ Set Screw
  • Strings: Ernie Ball 4 String Super Long #2849 (.045-.105)

item.title: Fender Precision Bass Black 1978 Vintage Electric Bass Guitar — $3,053.41
item.description:
$3,053.41 · Good · Sell Us Your Guitar

This guitar is a commission sale. If you have a high-end or vintage guitar you are interested in selling please contact us.


Here for sale we have a Fender Precision Bass in Black finish. The Fender Precision bass was launched in 1951, and despite how ubiquitous it is today, actually took a few years to catch on. Electric bass guitars were a new concept at the time, and Leo Fender had to travel to jazz clubs & concert halls to promote his new instrument face to face with musicians. Several design modifications were made throughout the '50s before a major revision in '57. The headstock was changed to resemble the Stratocaster rather than the Telecaster it had originally, and the pickguard was also changed to echo the design of the Strat. The iconic split single-coil pickup was added and the bridge was changed to a top-loading design with four steel saddles. Aside from offering Rosewood fingerboard & different pickup options in the following years, the P Bass' design has remained largely unchanged since 1957, and has gone down in history as the first commercially successful bass guitar design, with an immeasurable impact in the world of music.  


Made in the USA in 1978, this bass comes from the height of Fender's CBS era. Whilst CBS made several small design tweaks to Fender's instruments, the P Bass remained largely unchanged save for the use of a polyurethane finish. It is clear that this particular example has stood the test of time, and has been well played & enjoyed throughout its 47 year life. Naturally, a bolt-on construction is employed and comprises an Alder body, Maple neck and 20 fret Maple fingerboard. Chrome hardware is fitted including a top-loading bridge & split-post open-geared tuning machines. A split single-coil pickup is installed and wired to master volume & tone controls. 


The Maple neck plays very well, with a profile which might be described as a smooth and even 'C' shape, perhaps slightly thicker than you might find on Fender's modern offerings. Paired with the 7.25" fingerboard radius, this bass has a genuinely vintage specification. Along with the finish wear from the years of playing this bass has seen, the instrument feels very inspiring in the hands. Certainly, this bass has a 'mojo' to it which is often imitated on modern instruments but never equalled.


The split single-coil pickup installed in this guitar delivers fantastic fundamental bass tone right away, just as we expect from the Precision Bass. Deep, rumbling lows will fill out your mix, whilst punchy mids and a sparkly top end will ensure that you have plenty of snap and attack to provide a lively and percussive performance. pushing your bass playing forward in the mix to create more urgency in the sound. The controls keep things simple; not intruding on the playing experience but still offering ample opportunities for tone shaping. Rolling the tone control down darkens the sound nicely, allowing you to blend more easily into the mix for a more mellow, quite jazzy tone. A well-loved bass that has worked hard throughout it's life but still has plenty to give. 


Brand- Fender

Model- Precision Bass

Finish- Black

Year- 1978

Made In- USA

Body- Alder

Neck- Maple

Fingerboard- Maple

Fingerboard Radius- 7.25"

Frets- 20

Scale Length- 34"

Nut Width- 1.638"

Pickups- Fender Split Single-Coil

Controls- Master Volume, Master Tone


Luthier Report


Our ID: 1211025145570

Weight: 9.45lbs  

Serial: S861617


Aesthetic Condition:

Headstock: Overall fair condition, all aspects of the headstock demonstrate chipping, scratching and indentation of the finish, revealing the wood beneath. This is most notable to the rear top edge at the treble side where a section of finish has chipped away revealing the wood. A similar section of finish chipping is present at the treble side rear behind the nut where the instrument would make contact with a hanger. We recommend closely inspecting the photographs for a more detailed understanding of the cosmetic condition of this instrument.


Neck: Overall fair condition, all aspects of the neck & fingerboard demonstrate chipping, scratching and indentation of the finish, on frequent occasions revealing the wood beneath. This is most notable to the early register of the fingerboard where several sections of finish have chipped away, particularly at the bass side of frets 3 & 5 where large sections of wood are exposed. The surrounding wood has discolored notably from the original colour. The treble side fingerboard edge demonstrates wear through the finish revealing the wood beneath along the entire register. We recommend closely inspecting the photographs for a more detailed understanding of the cosmetic condition of this instrument.


Body: Overall fair condition, all aspects of the body demonstrate chipping, scratching and indentation of the finish, revealing the wood beneath. This is most notable to the bass side of the front face lower bout where a notable section of finish has worn away. The finish has clouded across the front face and sides. We recommend closely inspecting the photographs for a more detailed understanding of the cosmetic condition of this instrument.


Condition of Frets:

The frets demonstrate notable signs of use, with indentation in the early register and flattening of the crowns throughout. There is a small amount of material remaining for future fret work.


Current Set Up:

Truss Rod: Fully functional. Truss rod tool (flathead driver) not included.

Hardware: Fully functional with moderate signs of use, most notably oxidation of the saddles and bridge plate. A small section of the pickguard has broken off near the jack socket. 

Structural: No concerns or issues to note.

Height of the string from the 12th Fret-2.25mm - Bass 2.75mm

Please be aware that the action on a guitar may move slightly in transit and this measurement is the current height.


Strings on Guitar - 45-100


Although this bass demonstrates notable cosmetic wear, it is entirely functional and structurally sound, demonstrating the signs of an instrument that has been well played over the last 47 years..


Electrics: 

Fully functional.


Case & Accessories:

No case is provided with this guitar.

Truss rod tool not included. 


This guitar is a commission sale. If you have a high-end or vintage guitar you are interested in selling please contact us.


Please be aware that for international buyers import fees are not included in our postage and packaging cost, this only covers the cost of the guitar being sent to you. Import fees will be charged by Customs upon the guitar's arrival in the recipient country. Due to Brexit, this also applies to EU buyers. We advise checking the total import cost with Customs as this is not information we are able to accurately provide.

item.title: Gould GB50MBK Princeton Precision Bass Guitar - Matte Black — $193.80
item.description:
$193.80 · Brand New · Sutton Music Centre

The Gould Princeton bass is the ideal choice if you’re looking to kickstart your bass-playing journey or add a budget-friendly bass to your collection. With a Canadian maple neck and laurel fingerboard, this Gould Princeton bass provides a smooth and comfortable playing experience, making it perfect for beginner bassists.

The P/J pickups deliver a wide array of punchy and warm tones, allowing players to explore a range of styles and genres.

The lightweight poplar body ensures comfort during long practice sessions and makes handling the instrument easier for players of all ages, whether at home or on stage.

Specifications

Body: Poplar
Neck: Canadian Maple (Bolt-On)
Fingerboard: Laurel
Hardware: Chrome
Machineheads: Open Gear
Scale Length: 864mm
Pickups: P
Controls: 1 x Volume, 1 x Tone

item.title: Sandberg California JM4 Cherry Burst 2009 Electric Bass Guitar — $1,777.67
item.description:
$1,777.67 · Very Good · Sell Us Your Guitar

This guitar is a commission sale. If you have a high-end or vintage instrument you’re interested in selling, please contact us.


Here for sale we have a Sandberg California JM4 electric bass in Cherry Burst finish. Built in Germany in 2009, this bass features a bolt-on construction comprising an Alder body, Satin finished Maple neck topped with a 22 fret Rosewood fingerboard. The hardware featured on this bass consists of a Sandberg top-loading bridge and a set of Split-post open gear tuning machines. A pair of Delano pickups are featured with a Delano MM in the bridge position and a Delano J-Style in the middle, these are wired to a Master Volume w/ push/pull active/passive, pan, bass, treble and a coil switch.


The Maple neck sits comfortably in the hand, with the ‘C’ profile allowing for comfortable reach in all registers and promoting ergonomic thumb positioning, whilst the Satin finish has been played to a soft Gloss finish and is fantastic for smooth, quick transitions up and down the neck. The Rosewood fingerboard feels pleasant under the fingers, whilst the 14” radius allows for ease of different techniques such as slap bass or chordal playing. The double cutaway and contoured body design allows the player to have unobstructed access to the entire register, whilst also making longer durations of playing a comfortable experience.


The pair of Delano pickups deliver classic style tones and power, with smooth rounded lows, clear and open mid range and a sweet treble response that captures the attack and aggression of your playing. The active/passive push/pull control allows the user to switch between battery or passive output. This produces a crisp tone with more dynamic response on the active side, whereas the passive side is softer and reacts more to the player’s touch.This bass is capable of a wide range of tones thanks to the controls that are featured, the pan control allows for both pickups to work together to produce a punchier, thicker sound and separate EQ’s allow the user a wide palette to explore.

Brand - Sandberg

Model - California JM4

Finish - Cherry Burst

Year - 2009

Made In - Germany

Body - Alder

Neck - Maple

Neck Profile - 'C'

Fingerboard - Rosewood

Fingerboard Radius - 14”

Frets - 22

Scale Length- 34"

Nut Width - 1.551”

Pickups - 2 x Delano MM humbucker, Delano J-Style Single-Coil

Controls - Master Volume w/ push/pull active/passive, pan, bass, treble, coil switch


Luthier Report

Our ID: 1181225163450

Weight: 9.25lbs

Serial Number: 6731

Aesthetic Condition: 

Overall very good condition. Light indentations are scattered around the edges of the headstock, the most apparent of these can be seen to the treble side tip where the lacquer finish has lightly chipped away. 

Overall excellent condition. Very light indentations are present across the register to the rear of the neck, these can only be seen under very close scrutiny under direct light and can not be felt in the playing position. 

Overall very good condition. Light chipping of the finish is apparent to the treble side lower bout and near the input jack, these have exposed the wood beneath. All aspects of the body display light scratching, the most noticeable of these can be seen to the front face, bass side shoulder and to the bass side shoulder rear of the body. All scratching can be seen under direct light, common with gloss finishes.


Condition of Frets:

The frets demonstrate mild signs of use, not affecting playability. Denting and flattening of the frets is apparent throughout the register.  There is moderate material remaining for any fret work the new owner may wish to perform.


Current Set Up:

Truss Rod: Fully functional. Truss rod tool (4mm hex) not included.

Hardware: Overall very good condition. The control plate displays light scratching which can be seen under direct light, consistent with past use. Light oxidation can be seen to the pickup magnets, with this the logo on the pickup bobbins has slightly worn away from past use.

Structural: No concerns or issues to note.

Strings on Guitar - 45-100

Height of string from 12th Fret- Treble 2mm - Bass 2.25mm

Please be aware that the action on a guitar may move slightly in transit and this measurement is the current height. 

Electrics:

Fully functional. 9v battery not included.

Case & Accessories:

Sandberg gig bag.

Overall very good condition and fully functional. All aspects of the case display light signs of past use.

This guitar is a commission sale. If you have a high-end or vintage instrument you’re interested in selling, please contact us.


Please be aware that for international buyers import fees are not included in our postage and packaging cost, this only covers the cost of the guitar being sent to you. Import fees will be charged by Customs upon the guitar's arrival in the recipient country. Due to Brexit, this also applies to EU buyers. We advise checking the total import cost with Customs as this is not information we are able to accurately provide.

item.title: Ibanez AEGB24FE-MHS Fretless Mahogany Sunburst High Gloss — $400
item.description:
$400 · Very Good · Sage

Fretless acoustic electric Ibanez bass lightly used

item.title: Gibson Memphis ES-Les Paul Gold Top 2015 Hollow Body Electric Bass — $3,325.29
item.description:
$3,325.29 · Excellent · Sell Us Your Guitar

Here for sale we have a Gibson Memphis ES-Les Paul Hollow Body Electric Bass in Gold Top finish. Made in the USA in 2015, this bass consists of a 3-ply Maple/Poplar/Maple Laminate Hollow body, a Mahogany neck, and a 20-fret Rosewood fingerboard. Other appointments include a Tune-o-Matic bridge, Stopbar tailpiece, Hipshot tuners, and a set of Dual Custom Humbucking pickups. These pickups are wired to independent volume and tone controls, as well as three-way pickup selector.


The Mahogany neck pays very well, with the 'Rounded C' profile filling the hand nicely for a confidence-inspiring and comfortable grip in all registers. The 30.2" scale length is shorter than traditional for an electric bass, and is favoured by players with smaller hands or guitarists moonlighting as bass players. The Gloss finish to the rear assists with smooth navigation of the 20 fret Rosewood fingerboard. Pleasant under the fingers, the 12" fingerboard radius is as practical for a wide range of styles and playing techniques. The smooth and compact lines of the Semi-Hollow Les Paul body are supremely comfortable in the arms, ensuring that playing for extended periods is a breeze in both standing and seated positions. 


The pair of Gibson humbuckers installed in the Memphis ES-Les Paul Bass deliver powerful, full-bodied bass tones that will add serious depth to any band's sound. The Custom humbucker in the neck position drives the sound, offering a warm yet accurate bass response and punchy mids. The Custom Humbucker in the bridge position captures the bright overtones, allowing you to cut through the mix very effectively, helping you to create a percussive and rhythmic sound for the rest of the band to lock in with. Independent volume controls and independent tone controls offer comprehensive control of your sound, ensuring that you can blend into any musical situation with ease. 


Brand- Gibson

Model- Memphis ES-Les Paul Hollow Body Bass

Finish- Gold Top

Year- 2015

Made In- USA

Body- 3-ply Maple/Poplar/Maple Laminate

Neck- Mahogany

Neck Profile- Rounded 'C'

Fingerboard- Rosewood

Fingerboard Radius- 12"

Frets- 20

Scale Length- 30.2"

Nut Width- 1.6875"

Pickups- Dual Custom Humbuckers

Controls- 2x Volume, 2x Tone, 3-way pickup selector


Luthier Report


Our ID: 1180126172760

Weight: 6.8lbs  

Serial: 11545980


Aesthetic Condition:

Headstock: Overall very good condition. All aspects of the headstock demonstrate light scratching, only visible under direct light at certain angles, as is common on gloss finishes. The rear face top edge displays light chipping to the finish, revealing the wood beneath slightly.

Neck: Overall very good condition. The rear of the neck displays light scratching, only visible under direct light at certain angles, as is common on gloss finishes. None of these hairline scratches are substantial enough to be felt by the hand in playing position or by the fingertip upon inspection. Any markings to the fingerboard are difficult to discern.

Body: Overall very good condition. The body demonstrates light scratching and scuff marks throughout, none of which have removed the finish to reveal the wood beneath. Notable spots of nitro burn are present to the bottom of the side face, either side of the strap button, from resting on a stand. A small white scuff mark is present to the lower bout, near the jack socket.


Condition of Frets:

The frets demonstrate light signs of use, not affecting playability. There is considerable material remaining for any fret work the new owner may wish to perform.


Current Set Up:

Truss Rod: Fully functional. Truss rod tool (5/16" socket) not included.

Hardware: Fully functional and very good condition. Mild tarnishing is present to the pickup covers, bridge and tailpiece.

Structural: No concerns or issues to note.

Height of the string from the 12th Fret-2mm - Bass 2.5mm

Please be aware that the action on a guitar may move slightly in transit and this measurement is the current height.

Strings on Guitar - 45-100


Electrics: Fully functional.


Case & Accessories

Gibson Brown Hard Case

Overall very good condition. The outer shell and inner lining display very light signs of previous use.


Please be aware that for international buyers import fees are not included in our postage and packaging cost, this only covers the cost of the guitar being sent to you. Import fees will be charged by Customs upon the guitar's arrival in the recipient country. Due to Brexit, this also applies to EU buyers. We advise checking the total import cost with Customs as this is not information we are able to accurately provide.

item.title: Fender Player Precision Bass, maple fretboard, three-colour sunburst (2024) — $906.26
item.description:
$906.26 · Excellent · John's Swag

Fender Player Precision Bass, maple neck, three-colour sunburst.

Bought brand new in 2024 to be used as a studio bass, which is no longer needed. Has been used only a handful of times and never left my studio (kept in flight case and still has protective film covering pick guard and rear neck plate!). As such, looks brand new - no scratches or blemishes.

Really lovely bass to play and sounds great - exactly as you would expect.

Comes with flight case (see pictures) as well as guitar stand and Ernie Ball strap (also pictured).

Collection in Southside Glasgow preferred, but happy to ship via courier if you are happy to organise shipment etc!

Any questions, just ask :)

Cheers!

item.title: Hofner B-Bass icon series 2000s - Sun burst — $430
item.description:
$430 · Excellent · Janis's Gear Bazaar

Ready to play

item.title: Fender Jaguar 2026 - Quilted flamed maple mary kay white black burst — $1,350
item.description:
$1,350 · Fair · Snipes LLC

It’s brand new custom built by Allan Corona but it came with lots of blems.

Matching headstock

Pearl block inlays

Seymour Duncan Apollo jazz pickups

3 position switch for pickups

All black hardware

Lollipop tuners

String thru body

item.title: Sterling by Music Man StingRay RAY35HH, Stealth Black — $585
item.description:
$585 · Good · Aaron's Gear Garage

Sterling by Music Man Ray35HH in good condition. Normal play wear with small scratches and blemishes, primarily on the back of the body. There is also a ding on the top of the headstock. All components stock.

Weight is 10 lbs 7oz

item.title: Gear4music Bass — $97.60
item.description:
$97.60 · Fair · Raakin's Gear Outlet

Used bass which has reliably been used for gigs. Still working as well as when it was new.

item.title: Music Man Sterling 4H 1993 - Transparent Red — $1,500
item.description:
$1,500 · Good · Scott's Gear Locker

Up for sale I have a nice example of a 1993 Musicman sterling.

The bass is in solid shape but does show signs of a used instrument of it's age.

I'm fairly certain the body is alder
Birdseye maple neck
Rosewood fret board.

Weight is around 8.8lbs

Hardshell MM case included.

item.title: Overwater Inspiration 5 Natural Satin 2016 5 String Electric Bass — $1,896.18
item.description:
$1,896.18 · Very Good · Sell Us Your Guitar

Here for sale we have an Overwater Inspiration 5-String Electric Bass in Natural Satin finish. Established in 1979, The Overwater Guitar Company was started by Chris May and at the start it was an even split between making guitars and basses, however it then became apparent to Chris that there was a gap in the market for high quality, innovative bass guitars and thus the focus shifted. Overwater is now a world-renowned Bass brand and have served many professional bass players over the years. 


Made in Cumbria, UK in 2016, this bass features a bolt-on construction comprising an Ash body with Flame Maple top or 'Facings', a Maple neck, and a 24-fret Maple fingerboard. Black hardware is fitted including sealed tuning machines & a top-loading 5-saddle Overwater bridge. Chrome hardware, and a set of Overwater Soapbar pickups. These are wired to an Active Overwater preamp with master volume, pickup blend, and a 3-band EQ.


The Maple neck plays very well, with its profile somewhat resembling a 'D' shape, and feeling smooth and responsive in the hand. The Gloss finish to the rear of the neck feels pleasing under the thumb and enhances transitions up and down the neck, whilst the double cut design of the body makes for great access to the higher register. The Maple fingerboard provides a smooth and durable playing surface, with easy access and smooth playability across the register.


The Overwater Soapbar pickups have a well rounded tone, with a solid and commanding low end, a tight and punchy midrange, along with clear and cutting highs. The active controls offer a plethora of tonal options, allowing you to take full control of your sound with a 3-band active EQ and a pickup blend knob, great for sculpting out the perfect tone for any playing situation. Overall a really solid workhorse bass with a lovely modern feel!  


Brand- Overwater

Model- Inspiration 5

Finish- Natural Satin

Year- 2016

Made In- UK

Body- Ash

Top- Flame Maple

Neck- Maple

Fingerboard- Maple

Frets- 24

Scale Length- 35"

Nut Width- 1.787"

Pickups- 2x Overwater Soapbar 

Controls- Active Overwater 3-Band EQ, Master Volume, Master Tone


Luthier Report


Our ID: 1230226185461

Weight: 9.45lbs  

Serial: 15-3897


Aesthetic Condition:

Headstock: Overall excellent condition. A small indentation can be identified to the rear face towards to the top bass side corner. This discolors the finish slightly.


Neck: Overall very good condition. The fingerboard demonstrates several indentations between the 4th and 5th frets where the strings have made contact, leaving roundwound markings in the finish. The rear of the neck demonstrates infrequent light indentations throughout the register, visible only under direct lighting at certain angles and difficult to discern beneath the thumb.


Body: Overall very good condition. The front face demonstrates some light indentations to the bass side lower bout, slightly piercing the finish. The sides and edges demonstrate very light indentation, most concentrated around the jack socket. The rear face demonstrates a moderate indentation beside the control cavity cover, piercing the finish.


Condition of Frets:

The frets demonstrate very light signs of use, not affecting playability. There is considerable material remaining for future fret work.


Current Set Up:

Truss Rod: Fully functional. Truss rod tool (4mm hex) not included.

Hardware: Fully functional with light signs of wear.

Structural: No concerns or issues to note.

Height of the string from the 12th Fret-mm - Bass mm

Please be aware that the action on a guitar may move slightly in transit and this measurement is the current height.


Strings on Guitar - 35-125


Electrics: 

Fully functional. 9V Battery not included. 


Case & Accessories:

Unbranded hardcase.

Good condition. The case check strap has detached, meaning the case lid won’t stay open on its own. One bottom corner of the case has cracked, exposing the foam inside. The case protects the guitar as intended. COA included. Truss rod tool not included. 


Please be aware that for international buyers import fees are not included in our postage and packaging cost, this only covers the cost of the guitar being sent to you. Import fees will be charged by Customs upon the guitar's arrival in the recipient country. Due to Brexit, this also applies to EU buyers. We advise checking the total import cost with Customs as this is not information we are able to accurately provide.
